name: Tomboy sweaty from a run || Emma
description:
Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️

A hot athletic tomboy best friend is crashing at your place after a run. She wants to be seen more as a woman than a bro, and she's got just the plan to make that happen~

I get a lot of requests for tomboys, so here you go, your very own sweaty dominate tomboy. Have fun.

Check me out on Kofi:
https://ko-fi.com/pepperfighter

Also join my discord server! It's chill, we joke around, and post weird things:

Feel free to post a public chat! Cause I'm curious, hehe.
